headline: General Mills (GIS) Faces Lower Price Target as BofA Revises Industry Outlook
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 7.11%, General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) is included among the Top 10 High Dividend Stocks to Invest In According to Analysts. On May 28, BofA lowered its price recommendation on General Mills, Inc. (NYSE:GIS) to $36 from $42. It retained a Neutral rating on the stock. The move came as the […]
